examples: She was not coal or piccaninny black; she was “dusky”, “sepia”, “milk-chocolate”, café au lait.
He tossed the reins of his horse to a small piccaninny standing near and started up the steps.
Strung around them are scalps, of boys as well as of pirates, for these are the Piccaninny tribe, and not to be confused with the softer-hearted Delawares or the Hurons.
